extracted.full_content:
Isha Malhotra

Senior Talent Acquisition Executive | Corporate hiring

📢 Hiring: AI Tech Lead  

📍 Location: PAN India  
📄 Employment Type: Contract  
🧠 Experience Required: 5+ Years  

We are looking for an experienced AI Tech Lead to drive innovative AI/ML solutions and lead technical delivery across enterprise-scale initiatives. This role requires strong expertise in designing, deploying, and governing AI solutions while collaborating with cross-functional teams to create impactful business outcomes.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:  
• Lead technical solution delivery by creating prototypes and scalable AI/ML solutions for model development, deployment, and monitoring.  
• Enable end-to-end delivery including data integration, model training, and integration with enterprise systems aligned to organizational technology and data strategy.  
• Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including CDO, Business Units, and Architecture teams to identify and execute AI-driven opportunities.  
• Contribute to the design and implementation of AI/ML frameworks and enterprise solutions.  
• Ensure AI initiatives comply with governance frameworks, AI/ML best practices, data privacy, and security standards.  

🔹 Skills & Experience Required:  
• Strong expertise in AI/ML frameworks such as MLFlow and cloud platforms like Azure, AWS, and Databricks.  
• Deep understanding of MLOps practices across the AI/ML lifecycle.  
• Hands-on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), predictive analytics, and advanced ML techniques.  
• Knowledge of AI governance and compliance standards.  
• Experience in financial services or insurance sector preferred.  
• Proven ability to define technical roadmaps, solution estimations, and deployment strategies for AI initiatives.  
• Strong experience in developing technical architectures for AI/ML solutions.  

📩 Interested candidates can share their updated profile for further discussion at imalhotra@prointegrate.net 

#Hiring #AITechLead #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #MLOps #Azure #AWS #Databricks #MLFlow #LLM #ContractJobs #PanIndia #TechHiring #HiringNow

Welcome to CloudVandexa

HR N Kashyap

Head-HR Associate || Sr. Hiring Manager Director || Strategy & Leadership ||Onboarding || Budget & Resources || Market Intelligence || AI/HR Tech || Cloud || CRM || Business Growth

🚨 Urgent Hiring – AI/ML Engineer (LLM Platform & Model Management) 🚨

 👔 Role : AI/ML Engineer – LLM Platform & Model Management (AWS/GCP)
📍 Remote (US Shift)
🕒 Timing: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST
💼 Experience: 5+ Years
📅 Contract: 3–6 Months
⚡ Start: Immediate to 2 Weeks

We are looking for an experienced AI/ML Engineer with strong expertise in LLM platforms, MLOps, and cloud-based model deployment (AWS/GCP).

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
Deploy and manage ML models using AWS SageMaker
Migrate workloads from Google Vertex AI to AWS
Build scalable model inference & monitoring pipelines
Integrate LLM APIs (Gemini, Bedrock – Claude, Llama, Titan)
Implement multi-model routing & fallback strategies
Deploy LiteLLM for unified AI API access
Build RAG pipelines, semantic search & document processing systems
Work with ECS Fargate / Kubernetes (EKS) for scalable deployments

🛠 Core Skills:
Strong experience in MLOps / LLMOps
Hands-on with AWS & GCP (SageMaker, Vertex AI)
Expertise in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face
Experience with MLflow, APIs, and model-serving systems
Knowledge of NLP, Transformers & Generative AI workflows
Experience with containerization & microservices architecture

⭐ Nice to Have:
Experience with LiteLLM & multi-model orchestration
Exposure to cross-cloud migrations (Vertex AI → SageMaker)
Strong understanding of GPU workloads & Kubernetes (EKS)

🚀 Why Join?
Work on cutting-edge LLM & Generative AI solutions
Exposure to multi-cloud AI ecosystems
Opportunity to build enterprise-scale AI platforms

📩 Immediate joiners preferred. Share profiles at n.kashyap@cloudvandexa.com or DM 7644020326

#Hiring #AIMLEngineer #LLM #GenerativeAI #MLOps #LLMOps #AWS #GCP #SageMaker #VertexAI #Bedrock #Kubernetes #RemoteJobs #TechHiring #ImmediateHiring

Nidhi Rajput

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.

extracted.full_content:
C2C and W2 positions/ Direct clients/ Implementation Partners/All Over USA

Data Flags • 3rd+

🤖 Hiring: AI Developer (GenAI | Azure | Python) | 100% Remote | Contract
We are seeking a talented AI Developer with strong experience in Python, Azure Cloud, and Generative AI to build next-generation AI solutions, including RAG systems, agentic AI, and enterprise-grade chatbots.
🌍 Location: 100% Remote (Monthly onsite required)
⏳ Experience: 4–8 Years
📌 Interview Process: 2 Technical Rounds (Quick turnaround – interviews can start immediately)

🔍 What You’ll Do
GenAI & RAG Solutions
Design and implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using Azure AI/Search
Build pipelines for chunking, embeddings, re-ranking, and evaluation
Agentic AI Development
Develop multi-agent AI systems using AutoGen, CrewAI, or Agno
Implement secure tool-calling and workflow automation
AI Applications & Chatbots
Build production-grade chatbots (multi-turn, retrieval-grounded)
Implement prompt management, guardrails, audit logging, and telemetry
Azure Cloud & Integration
Integrate Azure OpenAI via API Management (APIM)
Manage secrets with Key Vault and events via Event Hub
Implement observability using App Insights & Log Analytics
DevOps & Security
Build CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps
Implement testing, red-teaming (prompt injection), and security best practices
Ensure compliance with RBAC and secure API design

✅ What We’re Looking For
4–8 years of software development experience
2+ years of hands-on GenAI / LLM experience
Strong proficiency in Python
Experience with Azure OpenAI & Azure AI/Search
Hands-on experience with agent frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI, Agno)
Strong understanding of security concepts (RBAC, API security)
Experience with CI/CD and Agile environments

⭐ Nice to Have
Experience with RAG evaluation frameworks (Ragas)
Familiarity with Cosmos DB and KQL
Knowledge of LLM cost optimization & latency tuning
Azure certifications (AI-102, AZ-204, AZ-305, DP-100)
Strong AI security mindset (prompt injection defense, data privacy, threat modeling)

🏆 Top Skills for Success
Python & Azure Cloud
GenAI / LLM / RAG Systems
Agentic AI Frameworks

👉 Apply Here:
